charter: Derive and execute the next tusq.dev increment from VISION.md without re-verifying completed M16. Focus on eval and regression infrastructure for the AI surface, because VISION.md explicitly requires golden tasks, expected tool-call sequences, permission/schema regression checks, and drift detection.

AgentXchain routes implementation/QA for that increment instead of looping on M16 planning_signoff
